affiliations.role: Major individual donor — $25,000 on 2023-10-17 and $25,000 on 2026-01-20, both reported with employer TaskUs. A fifth-generation Texan, he practices real estate and business transactions, urban development and land use, utility development and financing, local government regulation, and representation of special utility districts (water, sewer, drainage, road, recreation infrastructure).
